calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-03-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-03-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing/Court Trial this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Plaintiff: Narendrakumar J. Patel, present in pro per.
No appearance by the Defendant: Mike Doll.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Mike Doll as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 27 Dashiell Hammett #16, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $3,370.86
No Attorney's Fees.
Costs $243.30, for a total of $3,614.16
Judgment signed in open court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:NARENDRKUKMAR PATEL IN PRO PER
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MIKE DOLL
